name: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement
description: Common Paper Mutual NDA, created by a committee of over 40 attorneys representing technology vendors, procurement teams, boutique firms, and Big Law. A standardized agreement for mutual confidentiality between parties.

name: Mutual NDA Cover Page
description: Cover page template for the Common Paper Mutual NDA, used to capture the specific business terms and incorporate the standard terms by reference.

name: Cloud Service Agreement
description: Common Paper Cloud Service Agreement (CSA), a standardized agreement for selling and buying cloud software and SaaS products, created by a committee of over 40 attorneys.

name: Service Level Agreement
description: Common Paper Service Level Agreement (SLA), designed to be used alongside the Common Paper Cloud Service Agreement (CSA) to define service level commitments, uptime targets, and remedies.

name: Design Partner Agreement
description: Common Paper Design Partner Agreement, for companies engaging design partners in early-stage product development. Covers access, feedback, confidentiality, and IP ownership terms.

name: Professional Services Agreement
description: Common Paper Professional Services Agreement (PSA), for engaging professional services with defined deliverables, SOW terms, and governing law, created by a committee of over 40 attorneys.

name: Data Processing Agreement
description: Common Paper Data Processing Agreement (DPA), for governing the processing of personal data in compliance with data protection regulations such as GDPR, created by a committee of over 40 attorneys.

name: Partnership Agreement
description: Common Paper Partnership Agreement, for establishing business partnership terms between companies, including SOW terms, deliverables, and governing law.

name: Software License Agreement
description: Common Paper Software License Agreement, for licensing software products including Order Form terms, deliverable details, and governing law, created by a committee of over 40 attorneys.

name: Pilot Agreement
description: Common Paper Pilot Agreement, a short-term contract allowing prospective customers to test a product or service before committing to a longer-term deal. Covers access, fees, data handling, and termination.

name: Business Associate Agreement
description: Common Paper Business Associate Agreement (BAA), for governing the handling of protected health information (PHI) in compliance with HIPAA requirements, created by a committee of over 40 attorneys.

name: AI Addendum
description: Common Paper AI Addendum, for governing the use of artificial intelligence tools and services in commercial agreements, including data use, model training restrictions, and AI-specific compliance terms.
